method: SSDU-style self-supervised LoRA TTA (rank=4, ACS-protected split)
finding: Monotonic SSIM degradation at both learning rates, both domains. Positive control (knee-to-knee) confirms this is a method/proxy-task issue, not domain-shift-specific.
scope_caveat: Applies to an already-decent-baseline regime (T8 achieves 0.678 SSIM on brain before adaptation). Harder, more severely-mismatched-baseline scenarios (which SSDU-style TTA is typically designed for) were not tested.
